history.content:
<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward from my current position leads to a lava cell at row 02, column C, which is deadly. So, I should not move forward. I need to change direction to avoid the lava and navigate safely. Turning downwards (facing down) will allow me to move into a safe cell at row 03, column B. Currently facing right, to face down, I need to turn right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down (`v`) at row 02, column B. Moving forward would take me to row 03, column B, which is a floor cell (safe). Since the goal is at H8 and I want to progress downwards safely through empty cells, moving forward now is the best action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward will take me to row 04, column B which is safe (`.`). Continuing moving forward is the best action to continue navigating towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward will take me to row 05, column B which is safe (`.`). Continuing moving forward remains the best option.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05, column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward will take me to row 06, column B which is safe (`.`). Continuing to move forward is the best option.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B facing down (`v`). Moving forward to row 07, column B would be lava (`L`), which is deadly. I need to turn to find a safe path. Looking at the map, turning left to face right (`>`) and moving forward along row 06 seems safer to reach the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column B facing right (`>`). The next cells in row 06 from column C to H are mostly safe floor cells except column G which is lava. I can move forward along row 06 to column F safely. This will advance me closer to the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column C facing right (`>`). The next cell (row 06, column D) is safe floor (`.`). I will move forward to continue advancing towards the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Now I am at row 06, column D facing right. The next cell (row 06, column E) is safe floor (`.`), so I can continue moving forward towards the goal near row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column E facing right. The next cell (row 06, column F) is safe floor (`.`), so I should move forward to get closer to the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 06, column F facing right. The next cell (row 06, column G) contains lava (`L`), which is deadly. I must avoid moving forward. I can consider turning to find a safe path. Looking at the map, turning downwards (facing down) and moving forward to row 07, column F which is lava, is also unsafe. Turning upwards (facing up) and moving would lead me to row 05, column F which is floor. So, I should turn left (to face up).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 06, column F facing up. The cell ahead (row 05, column F) is floor (`.`), so moving forward is safe and will bring me closer to the goal located further down the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05, column F facing up. The cell ahead (row 04, column F) is floor (`.`), so I can move forward safely to continue exploring upwards before turning towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column F facing up. The cell ahead (row 03, column F) contains lava (`L`), which is deadly and must be avoided. To move towards the goal at row 08, column H, I should turn right to face right (`>`), so I can move along row 04 and try to go around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now facing right at row 04, column F, the cell ahead (row 04, column G) is floor (`.`), so I can safely move forward along row 04 towards the right side to eventually head down towards the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column G facing right. The next cell (row 04, column H) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward towards the goal side. I should move forward to continue progressing along this row closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 04, column H facing right. The next cell (row 04, column I) is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. I need to change direction to move downward towards the goal at row 08, column H. To face down, I will turn right (from right to down).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column H, facing down (`v`). The next cell in front (row 05, column H) is empty floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward toward the goal in row 08, column H. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05, column H facing down (`v`). The next cell in front (row 06, column H) is floor (`.`), safe to move forward to continue progressing towards the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column H, facing down (`v`). The next cell in front (row 07, column H) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column H facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me (row 08, column H) contains the goal (`G`). Moving forward will reach the goal and complete the mission.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
